title: guidonia icosandra
intro: Guidonia icosandra, also known as the Guidonia icosandra plant, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The leaves and roots of the plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Guidonia icosandra include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Guidonia icosandra can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in traditional remedies in the form of a paste or powder.
